title: Prove reconciliation effects are crash-atomic and replay-safe
preconditions: A real temporary SQLite generation contains approved evidence and compatible or ambiguous canonical transactions.
steps: Inject failure before and after each evidence, transaction, decision, link, coverage, idempotency, and commit boundary; restart and replay with identical and conflicting keys.
expected: Each outcome is wholly absent or wholly committed; identical request and logical evidence replays create no duplicate; conflicts fail closed; one canonical transaction remains.
cleanup: Delete only the temporary test generation.
